---
title: "Simulation_c_diff_x"
author: "Ziyi Wang"
date: "2025-08-30"
output:
  html_document: 
    theme: united
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: yes
    smooth_scroll: yes
    code_folding: "hide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, fig.align='center', tidy=TRUE, tidy.opts=list(blank=TRUE, width.cutoff=80), warning=FALSE,message=FALSE,cache=F)
library(locfdr)
library(admix)
library(mvtnorm)
library(mixtools)
library(devtools)
library(KScorrect)
library(mclust)
library(adaptMT)
library(AdaPTGMM)
library(splines2)
library(splines)
library(IHW)
library(FDRreg)
library(chai)

setwd("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian")
# source("ConditionalGaussianlFDR_defined_functions_playing.R")
# source("chai.R")

# summary_by_aq <- readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_summary_diff_q.rds")
# 
# results_all <-  readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_all_results_diff_q.rds")

# results_0 <- readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_all_results_with_zero.rds")
# summary_0 <- readRDS("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_summary_with_zero.rds")

# shiny::runApp("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian")
```


# Simulation Setting

Simulation setting:

- Under Null (n0 = 950):
$$ z_0 \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1) $$
$$ x_0 \sim \mathcal{N}(-0.5, 1) $$

- Under Alternative 1 (n1 = 25):
$$ z_1 \sim \mathcal{N}(2, 0.5) $$
$$ x_1 \sim \mathcal{N}(3, 1)  $$
- Under Alternative 2 (n2 = 25):
$$ z_2 \sim \mathcal{N}(3, 0.5) $$
$$ x_2 \sim \mathcal{N}(5, 1)  $$


```{r}
set.seed(123)
n = 1000
n0 <- 950
n1 <- 25

# z
z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
z <- c(z0, z1, z2)

# X
m0 <- -0.5;   m1 <- 3;     m2 <- 5
sd0 <- 1;     sd1 <- 1;    sd2 <- 1
a_grid <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2)
a = 1

m0a <- m0
m1a <- m0 + a * (m1 - m0)
m2a <- m0 + a * (m2 - m0)

x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = m0a, sd = sd0)
x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m1a, sd = sd1)
x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m2a, sd = sd2)
X  <- c(x0, x1, x2)


gt_c <- seq((n0+1), n)    
length(gt_c)            # 50
```


# Plot of z and X

```{r}
ggplot(data.frame(Z = z), aes(x = Z)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "lightblue") + 
  geom_density(aes(y = ..density..), color = "red") + 
  labs(x = "Z-score", y = "Density", title = "Histogram of z") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(data.frame(X = X), aes(x = X)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), binwidth = 0.2, color = "black", fill = "green") + 
  geom_density(aes(y = ..density..), color = "red") + 
  labs(x = "X", y = "Density", title = "Histogram of X") +
  theme_minimal()

df <- data.frame(z = z, X = X, label = true_labels)
# Plot
ggplot(df, aes(x = z, y = X, color = label)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  labs(x = "z", y = "X", color = "Group") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Null" = "gray50", "Signal" = "red"))
```


# Chai 

```{r}
res_c.05.chai <- chai(z, X, M=100)   # 48, 0.042, 0.92
select <- lFDRselect(res_c.05.chai, q = 0.05)
performance(gt_c, select, z = res_c.05.chai$z, 
            bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)[c(4,1,2)]
```

# FDRreg
```{r, echo=FALSE}
set.seed(123)
fdrreg <- FDRreg(z, as.matrix(X), nulltype = "theoretical")
performance(gt_c, which(fdrreg$FDR <= 0.05), z = z,
                        bh_level = 0.05, one.sided = TRUE)
```
# IHW
```{r}
p <- 1 - pnorm(z)
alpha <- 0.05

fit <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = X, alpha = alpha, nbins = 10)
rejections(fit)
```



# Repeating
```{r}
## =========================
## X informativeness：a-grid
## =========================
library(splines)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
require(OrderShapeEM)
library(IHW)

set.seed(1)
seeds <- sample(1:10000, 99)
seeds <- c(seeds, 123)

# informativeness grid：from 'no info' to 'higher info'
a_grid <- c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2)

q_grid <- seq(0.01, 0.1, by = 0.01)
alphas  <- q_grid

results_list <- list()

for (s in seq_along(seeds)) {
  set.seed(seeds[s])

  ## Fix the z
  n  <- 1000
  n0 <- 950
  n1 <- 25

  z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
  z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
  z  <- c(z0, z1, z2)

  # ground truth
  gt <- seq((n0 + 1), n)

  # p-value (one-sided)
  p <- 1 - pnorm(z)

  # paratmeters for Adapt
  formula <- paste0("ns(X, df = ", 2:8, ")")

  ## X
  m0 <- -0.5; m1 <- 3; m2 <- 5
  sd0 <- 1;   sd1 <- 1; sd2 <- 1
  
  for (a in a_grid) {
    m0a <- m0
    m1a <- m0 + a * (m1 - m0)
    m2a <- m0 + a * (m2 - m0)

    x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = m0a, sd = sd0)
    x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m1a, sd = sd1)
    x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m2a, sd = sd2)
    X  <- c(x0, x1, x2)
    x_df <- data.frame(X = X)

    perf_a <- data.frame(
      Seed = integer(),
      a    = numeric(),
      q    = numeric(),
      Method   = character(),
      Selected = numeric(),
      FDP      = numeric(),
      Power    = numeric(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    ## 1) chai 
    res_chai <- chai(z, X, M = 100)
    
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      select <- lFDRselect(res_chai, q = q_grid[qq])
      p2  <- performance(gt, select, z = res_chai$z,
                         bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      # chai
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "chai", p2[[4]], p2[[1]], p2[[2]])
      # BH
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "BH",   p2[[13]], p2[[8]], p2[[9]])
    }


    ## 2) adapt_gmm (z)
    res_gmm_z <- adapt_gmm(x_df, z = z, alphas = alphas,
                           beta_formulas = formula, testing = "one_sided")
    
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      # idx <- match(qq, alphas)  # 0.05 -> 5, 0.06 -> 6, ..., 0.10 -> 10
      p3  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_z$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                         bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_z", p3[[4]], p3[[1]], p3[[2]])
    }

    ## 3) adapt_gmm (p)
    res_gmm_p <- adapt_gmm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = alphas,
                           beta_formulas = formula, testing = "one_sided")
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      # idx <- match(qq, alphas)
      p4  <- performance(gt, res_gmm_p$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                         bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "adapt_gmm_p", p4[[4]], p4[[1]], p4[[2]])
    }

    ## 4) adapt_glm
    res_glm <- adapt_glm(x_df, pvals = p, alphas = alphas,
                         pi_formulas = formula, mu_formulas = formula)
    empty <- is.null(res_glm) || (!is.list(res_glm$rejs))
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      if (!empty && lengths(res_glm$rejs)[qq] > 0L){
       p5 <- performance(gt, res_glm$rejs[[qq]], z = z,
                          bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
       perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", p5[[4]], p5[[1]], p5[[2]])
       
      } else {
        perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "adapt_glm", 0, NA, NA)
      }
    }

    ## 5) OrderShapeEM
    tryCatch({
      res_osem <- OrderShapeEM(pvals = p, order.var = X,
                               OrderShapeEM.control(trace = FALSE))
      for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
        p6 <- performance(gt, which(res_osem$fdr <= q_grid[qq]), z = z,
                          bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
        perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM", p6[[4]], p6[[1]], p6[[2]])
      }
    }, error = function(e) {
      message(paste("OrderShapeEM failed at seed", seeds[s], "a =", a, ":", e$message))
      for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
        perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "OrderShapeEM", NA, NA, NA)
      }
    })

    ## 6) FDRreg（theoretical null）
    res_fdrreg <- FDRreg(z, as.matrix(X), nulltype = "theoretical")
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      p7 <- performance(gt, which(res_fdrreg$FDR <= q_grid[qq]), z = z,
                        bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "FDRreg", p7[[4]], p7[[1]], p7[[2]])
    }
    
    # Get the results
    results_list[[length(results_list)+1]] <- perf_a
  }
}

results_all <- bind_rows(results_list)

results_all <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    Selected = as.numeric(Selected),
    FDP      = as.numeric(FDP),
    Power    = as.numeric(Power)
  )

# If Selected==0，FDP/Power set to be NA
results_all <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, FDP),
    Power = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, Power)
  )

## Group_by a and q
summary_by_aq <- results_all %>%
  group_by(Method, a, q) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_by_aq %>% filter(a == 1, q == 0.05)

# # Check on a vs every m
# a_grid <- c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.5, 2)
# m0 <- -0.5; m1 <- 3; m2 <- 5
# 
# mu_by_a <- cbind(
#   m0a = rep(m0, length(a_grid)),
#   m1a = m0 + a_grid * (m1 - m0),
#   m2a = m0 + a_grid * (m2 - m0)
# )
# rownames(mu_by_a) <- paste0("a=", a_grid)
# 
# mu_by_a

# saveRDS(results_all, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_all_results.rds")

# saveRDS(summary_by_aq, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_summary_by_aq.rds")

```

# IHW
```{r}
library(splines)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
require(OrderShapeEM)
library(IHW)

set.seed(1)
seeds <- sample(1:10000, 99)
seeds <- c(seeds, 123)

# informativeness grid：from 'no info' to 'higher info'
# a_grid <- c(0, 0.5)
a_grid <- c(1, 1.5, 2)

q_grid <- seq(0.09, 0.1, by = 0.01)
alphas  <- q_grid

results_ihw <- list()

for (s in seq_along(seeds)) {
  set.seed(seeds[s])

  ## Fix the z
  n  <- 1000
  n0 <- 950
  n1 <- 25

  z0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = 0, sd = 1)
  z1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 2, sd = 0.5)
  z2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = 3, sd = 0.5)
  z  <- c(z0, z1, z2)

  # ground truth
  gt <- seq((n0 + 1), n)

  # p-value (one-sided)
  p <- 1 - pnorm(z)

  # paratmeters for Adapt
  formula <- paste0("ns(X, df = ", 2:8, ")")

  ## X
  m0 <- -0.5; m1 <- 3; m2 <- 5
  sd0 <- 1;   sd1 <- 1; sd2 <- 1
  
  for (a in a_grid) {
    m0a <- m0
    m1a <- m0 + a * (m1 - m0)
    m2a <- m0 + a * (m2 - m0)

    x0 <- rnorm(n0, mean = m0a, sd = sd0)
    x1 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m1a, sd = sd1)
    x2 <- rnorm(n1, mean = m2a, sd = sd2)
    X  <- c(x0, x1, x2)
    x_df <- data.frame(X = X)

    perf_a <- data.frame(
      Seed = integer(),
      a    = numeric(),
      q    = numeric(),
      Method   = character(),
      Selected = numeric(),
      FDP      = numeric(),
      Power    = numeric(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # 8. IHW
    # First x
    for (qq in seq_along(q_grid)) {
      res_ihw <- ihw(pvalues = p, covariates = x_df[,1], alpha = q_grid[qq], nbins = 5)
      p8 <- performance(gt, which(adj_pvalues(res_ihw) <= q_grid[qq]), z = z, bh_level = q_grid[qq], one.sided = TRUE)
        
      perf_a[nrow(perf_a)+1,] <- list(seeds[s], a, q_grid[qq], "IHW", p8[[4]], p8[[1]], p8[[2]])
    }

    # Get the results
    results_ihw[[length(results_ihw)+1]] <- perf_a
  }
}

# results_ihwa_a1_01_03 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a2_01_03 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a1_04_06 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a2_04_06 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a1_07_08 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a2_07_08 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
# results_ihwa_a1_09_1 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)
results_ihwa_a2_09_1 <- bind_rows(results_ihw)

results_ihw <- rbind(results_ihwa_a1_01_03,
                     results_ihwa_a2_01_03,
                     results_ihwa_a1_04_06,
                     results_ihwa_a2_04_06,
                     results_ihwa_a1_07_08,
                     results_ihwa_a2_07_08, 
                     results_ihwa_a1_09_1, 
                     results_ihwa_a2_09_1)

# saveRDS(results_ihw, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_ihw.rds")


results_ihw <- results_ihw %>%
  mutate(
    Selected = as.numeric(Selected),
    FDP      = as.numeric(FDP),
    Power    = as.numeric(Power)
  )

# If Selected==0，FDP/Power set to be NA
results_ihw <- results_ihw %>%
  mutate(
    FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, FDP),
    Power = ifelse(Selected == 0, NA_real_, Power)
  )

results_all_wt_ihw <- rbind(results_all, results_ihw)

results_all_wt_ihw$q <- round(results_all_wt_ihw$q, 2)


## Group_by a and q
summary_results_with_ihw <- results_all_wt_ihw %>%
  group_by(Method, q, a) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_results_with_ihw %>% filter(a == 1, q == 0.05)

# saveRDS(results_all_wt_ihw, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_all_results_diff_q.rds")
# 
# saveRDS(summary_results_with_ihw, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_summary_diff_q.rds")
```

### Change NA in FDP and power to 0
```{r}
library(dplyr)

results_0 <- results_all %>%
  mutate(
    FDP   = ifelse(Selected == 0 & is.na(FDP), 0, FDP),
    Power = ifelse(Selected == 0 & is.na(Power), 0, Power)
  )

summary_0 <- results_0 %>%
  group_by(Method, q, a) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Selected = mean(Selected),
    mean_FDP      = mean(FDP),
    mean_Power    = mean(Power),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summary_0 %>% filter(a == 1, q == 0.05)


# saveRDS(results_0, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_all_results_with_zero.rds")
# 
# saveRDS(summary_0, "C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/chai_env/simC_summary_with_zero.rds")
```


# Visualization
# pre-processing for Plots

```{r}
summary_C_by_a_q <- summary_0

order <- c("chai", "adapt_glm", "adapt_gmm_z", "adapt_gmm_p", 
           "FDRreg", "OrderShapeEM", "IHW", "BH")

summary_C_by_a_q$Method <- factor(summary_C_by_a_q$Method, levels = order)


library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

simC_long <- summary_C_by_a_q %>%
  mutate(
    mean_FDP   = ifelse(is.nan(mean_FDP), NA, mean_FDP),
    mean_Power = ifelse(is.nan(mean_Power), NA, mean_Power)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(mean_FDP, mean_Power),
               names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Metric = recode(Metric,
                         mean_FDP = "FDP",
                         mean_Power = "Power"))
```

# Consistant color functions

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# ---------- color helpers ----------
blend_color <- function(col, target = "white", amount = 0.4) {
  a <- grDevices::col2rgb(col) / 255
  b <- grDevices::col2rgb(target) / 255
  out <- (1 - amount) * a + amount * b
  grDevices::rgb(out[1,], out[2,], out[3,])
}

variant_shades <- function(base_col, K = 12) {
  grDevices::colorRampPalette(c(
    blend_color(base_col, "white", 0.55),
    base_col,
    blend_color(base_col, "black", 0.25)
  ))(K)
}

make_method_palette <- function(methods, K = 12) {
  fixed <- c(
    chai        = "red",
    adapt_glm   = "#FF7F0E",
    adapt_gmm_z = "#2CA02C",
    adapt_gmm_p = "#9467BD",
    FDRreg      = "#8C564B",
    BH          = "black"
  )

  family_base <- c(
    OrderShapeEM = "#1F77B4",  # blue family
    IHW          = "#17BECF"   # teal family
  )

  ord_shades <- variant_shades(family_base["OrderShapeEM"], K = K)
  ihw_shades <- variant_shades(family_base["IHW"],          K = K)

  methods <- unique(as.character(methods))
  pal <- setNames(rep("#7F7F7F", length(methods)), methods)  # fallback grey

  for (m in methods) {
    if (m %in% names(fixed)) {
      pal[m] <- fixed[m]
      next
    }

    base <- sub("_x\\d+$", "", m)
    idx  <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub(".*_x", "", m)))

    if (base %in% names(family_base)) {
      if (is.na(idx)) {
        pal[m] <- family_base[base]  # e.g. "OrderShapeEM" with no suffix
      } else {
        idx <- max(1L, min(idx, K))
        pal[m] <- if (base == "OrderShapeEM") ord_shades[idx] else ihw_shades[idx]
      }
    }
  }

  pal
}

method_order <- function(methods) {
  methods <- unique(as.character(methods))
  core <- c("chai","adapt_glm","adapt_gmm_z","adapt_gmm_p","FDRreg")

  sort_family <- function(base) {
    fam <- methods[grepl(paste0("^", base, "(_x\\d+)?$"), methods)]
    base_present <- base %in% fam
    vars <- fam[grepl("_x\\d+$", fam)]
    if (length(vars)) {
      idx <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(sub(".*_x", "", vars)))
      vars <- vars[order(idx)]
    }
    c(if (base_present) base else character(0), vars)
  }

  out <- c(core, sort_family("OrderShapeEM"), sort_family("IHW"), "BH")
  out <- unique(out)
  out[out %in% methods]
}

# ---------- Updated plotting function (fix a or q) ----------
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)

plot_metric_aq <- function(long_table, metric_name, x_var = c("q","a"),
                           ylab, title,
                           K_variants = 12,
                           fdp_y = 0.2,
                           x_breaks = NULL,
                           q_level = 0.05) {

  x_var <- match.arg(x_var)

  dat <- long_table %>%
    dplyr::filter(Metric == metric_name) %>%
    mutate(Method = as.character(Method))

  ord <- method_order(dat$Method)
  dat <- dat %>% mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = ord))
  pal <- make_method_palette(levels(dat$Method), K = K_variants)

  # endpoints for labels = last x (either max q or max a)
  endpoints <- dat %>%
    group_by(Method) %>%
    filter(.data[[x_var]] == max(.data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(label = as.character(Method))
  
  y_max <- if (metric_name == "FDP") fdp_y else 1
  
  endpoints <- endpoints %>%
  mutate(
    Value_label = pmin(Value, y_max)   # clamp label anchor to the axis top
  )

  x_rng   <- range(dat[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE)
  x_nudge <- diff(x_rng) * 0.03

  p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = Value, group = Method, color = Method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.9, na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_point(size = 1.6, na.rm = TRUE) +
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = endpoints,
      aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = Value_label, label = label),
      nudge_x = x_nudge,
      hjust = 0,
      direction = "y",
      box.padding = 0.25,
      point.padding = 0.15,
      segment.size = 0.25,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      seed = 1,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = pal, breaks = ord) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    labs(x = x_var, y = ylab, title = title) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.margin = margin(5.5, 60, 5.5, 5.5)
    )

  if (!is.null(x_breaks)) {
    p <- p + scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks,
                                expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.18)))
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.18)))
  }

  if (metric_name == "FDP" && x_var == "q") {
    p <- p +
      geom_segment(
        aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = 0.1, yend = 0.1),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        linetype = "dashed",
        linewidth = 1.2,
        color = "black"
      ) +
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, fdp_y))
  }
  
  if (metric_name == "FDP" && x_var == "a") {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(
        yintercept = q_level,
        linetype = "dashed",
        linewidth = 1.2,
        color = "black"
      ) +
      coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, fdp_y))
  }

  p
}

```

## Fix a

```{r}
library(patchwork)

a0_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(a - 0) < 1e-12)
a0_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(a0_dat, "FDP", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs q (a = 0)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.12,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a0_dat$q)))
a0_pow <- plot_metric_aq(a0_dat, "Power", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs q (a = 0)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a0_dat$q)))

a0.5_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(a - 0.5) < 1e-12)
a0.5_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(a0.5_dat, "FDP", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs q (a = 0.5)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.12,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a0.5_dat$q)))
a0.5_pow <- plot_metric_aq(a0.5_dat, "Power", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs q (a = 0.5)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a0.5_dat$q)))

a1_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(a - 1) < 1e-12)
a1_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(a1_dat, "FDP", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs q (a = 1)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.12,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a1_dat$q)))
a1_pow <- plot_metric_aq(a1_dat, "Power", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs q (a = 1)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a1_dat$q)))


a1.5_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(a - 1.5) < 1e-12)
a1.5_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(a1.5_dat, "FDP", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs q (a = 1.5)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.12,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a1.5_dat$q)))
a1.5_pow <- plot_metric_aq(a1.5_dat, "Power", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs q (a = 1.5)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a1.5_dat$q)))

a2_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(a - 2) < 1e-12)
a2_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(a2_dat, "FDP", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs q (a = 2)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.12,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a2_dat$q)))
a2_pow <- plot_metric_aq(a2_dat, "Power", x_var = "q",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs q (a = 2)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(a2_dat$q)))


fdps  <- list(a0_fdp, a0.5_fdp, a1_fdp, a1.5_fdp, a2_fdp)
pows  <- list(a0_pow, a0.5_pow, a1_pow, a1.5_pow, a2_pow)

combo <- wrap_plots(
  c(fdps, pows),
  nrow = 5, ncol = 2,
  byrow = FALSE
) + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Method Performance vs q")

combo


# ggsave("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/plots/Simulations/SimC_fixa_fdr_power_updated_zero.png", plot = combo, width = 14, height = 18, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```


## Fix q

```{r}
library(patchwork)

q0.01_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(q - 0.01) < 1e-12)
q0.01_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(q0.01_dat, "FDP", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs a (q = 0.01)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.15,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.01_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.01)

q0.01_pow <- plot_metric_aq(q0.01_dat, "Power", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs a (q = 0.01)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.01_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.01)


q0.05_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(q - 0.05) < 1e-12)
q0.05_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(q0.05_dat, "FDP", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs a (q = 0.05)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.15,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.05_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.05)

q0.05_pow <- plot_metric_aq(q0.05_dat, "Power", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs a (q = 0.05)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.05_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.05)



q0.1_dat <- dplyr::filter(simC_long, abs(q - 0.1) < 1e-12)
q0.1_fdp <- plot_metric_aq(q0.1_dat, "FDP", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean FDP",
                            title = sprintf("FDP vs a (q = 0.1)"),
                            fdp_y = 0.15,
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.1_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.1)

q0.1_pow <- plot_metric_aq(q0.1_dat, "Power", x_var = "a",
                            ylab = "Mean Power",
                            title = sprintf("Power vs a (q = 0.1)"),
                            x_breaks = sort(unique(q0.1_dat$a)),
                            q_level = 0.1)



fdps_pow  <- list(q0.01_fdp, q0.05_fdp, q0.1_fdp)
pows_pow  <- list(q0.01_pow, q0.05_pow, q0.1_pow)

combo_q <- wrap_plots(
  c(fdps_pow, pows_pow),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 2,
  byrow = FALSE
) + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Method Performance vs a")

combo_q


# ggsave("C:/Users/zwang26/OneDrive - UTHealth Houston/conditionalGaussian/plots/Simulations/SimC_fixq_fdr_power_updated_zero.png", plot = combo_q, width = 12, height = 12, units = "in", dpi = 300)

```
